subject: A blue-skinned robed figure standing atop a rocky outcrop with arms raised in a commanding gesture, surrounded by a pack of beasts gathered in a wild forested clearing below
description: A tall figure draped in flowing pale robes stands on a stone outcrop with both arms raised wide, head tilted upward as if invoking a power or rallying a crowd. The figure's skin reads as cool blue-grey, evoking a divine or god-touched presence consistent with Theros iconography. Below and around the outcrop, a pack of beasts is loosely gathered in a wild forested setting — figures suggest centaur or hound silhouettes among trees and broken stone. The palette is dominated by lush greens of foliage with cool blue accents on the central figure and sky, giving the scene a sublime, ritual-charged mood.
foreground: robed figure on rocky outcrop with arms raised, surrounded by beasts in undergrowth
background: forested wilderness with trees and rocky terrain receding into hazy distance
